# HotNow Source Input Simplification Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Simplify `/settings/sources` so RSS additions only require `rssUrl`, WeChat additions only require `wechatName + optional articleUrl`, and all internal source metadata is generated by HotNow during save.

**Architecture:** Keep the current `RSS-first` pipeline and the existing WeChat bridge registration module. Add a new “user input resolver” layer in front of `saveSource(...)` so the UI and HTTP contracts become intent-based while `content_sources` still stores fully normalized rows with final `rss_url`; save remains synchronous and only successful resolutions are persisted.

**Tech Stack:** TypeScript, Fastify, Vue 3, Ant Design Vue, SQLite, Vitest

---

## File Map

**Create**

- `src/core/source/readFeedMetadata.ts`
  Fetch and parse RSS/Atom metadata needed to infer source name and homepage.
- `src/core/source/resolveSourceUserInput.ts`
  Convert simplified user-facing payloads into normalized `SaveSourceInput`.
- `tests/source/readFeedMetadata.test.ts`
  Cover feed title/homepage extraction and invalid-feed failures.
- `tests/source/resolveSourceUserInput.test.ts`
  Cover RSS resolution, WeChat article-link resolution, and WeChat name-only resolution.

**Modify**

- `src/core/source/sourceMutationRepository.ts`
  Keep low-level persistence focused on normalized source rows; no user-facing payload parsing lives here.
- `src/core/wechat/wechatBridgeProviders.ts`
  Add a name-search/lookup hook for WeChat bridge resolution alongside `addurl`.
- `src/core/wechat/registerWechatBridgeSource.ts`
  Accept either article-link or name-derived WeChat bridge registration.
- `src/server/createServer.ts`
  Replace the current create/update payload parser with the simplified contract and wire it through the resolver layer.
- `src/main.ts`
  Inject the new resolver-aware create/update handlers into `createServer(...)`.
- `src/client/services/settingsApi.ts`
  Replace advanced source payloads with simplified RSS/WeChat payload types.
- `src/client/pages/settings/SourcesPage.vue`
  Replace the current advanced source modal with a simplified RSS modal and WeChat modal.
- `src/core/source/listSourceCards.ts`
  Remove internal bridge-input summary from default workbench presentation if it no longer serves the simplified UI.
- `src/core/source/listSourceWorkbench.ts`
  Keep the read model aligned with the simplified inventory table shape.
- `README.md`
  Document the simplified source input model.
- `AGENTS.md`
  Document the new `/settings/sources` interaction and internal auto-generation behavior.

**Test**

- `tests/client/sourcesPage.test.ts`
- `tests/client/settingsApi.test.ts`
- `tests/server/systemRoutes.test.ts`
- `tests/source/sourceMutationRepository.test.ts`
- `tests/source/listSourceCards.test.ts`
- `tests/source/listSourceWorkbench.test.ts`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing feed-metadata and resolver tests**

```ts
it("reads rss title and homepage from a valid feed", async () => {
  const fetchMock = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(
    new Response(
      `<?xml version="1.0"?>
       <rss version="2.0">
         <channel>
           <title>Example Feed</title>
           <link>https://example.com/</link>
         </channel>
       </rss>`,
      { status: 200, headers: { "content-type": "application/rss+xml" } }
    )
  );

  await expect(readFeedMetadata("https://example.com/feed.xml", fetchMock)).resolves.toEqual({
    title: "Example Feed",
    siteUrl: "https://example.com/"
  });
});

it("resolves simplified rss input into normalized source fields", async () => {
  const fetchMock = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(
    new Response(
      `<?xml version="1.0"?>
       <rss version="2.0">
         <channel>
           <title>Example Feed</title>
           <link>https://example.com/</link>
         </channel>
       </rss>`,
      { status: 200 }
    )
  );

  await expect(
    resolveSourceUserInput(
      {
        mode: "create",
        sourceType: "rss",
        rssUrl: "https://example.com/feed.xml"
      },
      { fetch: fetchMock, wechatBridge: null }
    )
  ).resolves.toEqual(
    expect.objectContaining({
      sourceType: "rss",
      kind: "example_feed",
      name: "Example Feed",
      siteUrl: "https://example.com/",
      rssUrl: "https://example.com/feed.xml"
    })
  );
});

it("resolves simplified wechat input from article url", async () => {
  const fetchMock = vi
    .fn()
    .mockResolvedValueOnce(
      new Response(JSON.stringify({ err: "", data: "https://bridge.example.test/feed/123.xml" }), {
        status: 200
      })
    );

  await expect(
    resolveSourceUserInput(
      {
        mode: "create",
        sourceType: "wechat_bridge",
        wechatName: "数字生命卡兹克",
        articleUrl: "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=abc"
      },
      {
        fetch: fetchMock,
        wechatBridge: { baseUrl: "https://bridge.example.test", token: "secret-token" }
      }
    )
  ).resolves.toEqual(
    expect.objectContaining({
      sourceType: "wechat_bridge",
      kind: "wechat_数字生命卡兹克",
      name: "数字生命卡兹克"
    })
  );
});
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run the new tests and verify they fail**

Run: `npx vitest run tests/source/readFeedMetadata.test.ts tests/source/resolveSourceUserInput.test.ts -v`

Expected: FAIL because neither resolver exists and WeChat provider lookup only supports article-link registration.

- [ ] **Step 3: Implement feed metadata extraction and simplified resolution**

```ts
// src/core/source/readFeedMetadata.ts
import { XMLParser } from "fast-xml-parser";

export async function readFeedMetadata(
  rssUrl: string,
  fetchFn: typeof fetch = fetch
): Promise<{ title: string; siteUrl: string }> {
  const response = await fetchFn(rssUrl);

  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error("invalid-rss-feed");
  }

  const xml = await response.text();
  const parser = new XMLParser({ ignoreAttributes: false, trimValues: true });
  const parsed = parser.parse(xml) as {
    rss?: { channel?: { title?: string; link?: string } };
    feed?: { title?: string | { "#text"?: string }; link?: { "@_href"?: string } | Array<{ "@_href"?: string }> };
  };

  const title =
    parsed.rss?.channel?.title?.trim() ||
    (typeof parsed.feed?.title === "string" ? parsed.feed.title.trim() : parsed.feed?.title?.["#text"]?.trim()) ||
    "";
  const siteUrl =
    parsed.rss?.channel?.link?.trim() ||
    (Array.isArray(parsed.feed?.link)
      ? parsed.feed.link.find((entry) => entry?.["@_href"])?.["@_href"]?.trim()
      : parsed.feed?.link?.["@_href"]?.trim()) ||
    new URL("/", rssUrl).toString();

  if (!title || !siteUrl) {
    throw new Error("invalid-rss-feed");
  }

  return { title, siteUrl };
}
```

```ts
// src/core/source/resolveSourceUserInput.ts
export type SaveSourceUserInput =
  | {
      mode: "create";
      sourceType: "rss";
      rssUrl: string;
    }
  | {
      mode: "update";
      sourceType: "rss";
      kind: string;
      rssUrl: string;
    }
  | {
      mode: "create";
      sourceType: "wechat_bridge";
      wechatName: string;
      articleUrl?: string;
    }
  | {
      mode: "update";
      sourceType: "wechat_bridge";
      kind: string;
      wechatName: string;
      articleUrl?: string;
    };

export async function resolveSourceUserInput(input: SaveSourceUserInput, deps: ResolveDeps): Promise<SaveSourceInput> {
  if (input.sourceType === "rss") {
    const rssUrl = normalizeHttpUrl(input.rssUrl);
    const metadata = await readFeedMetadata(rssUrl, deps.fetch);

    return {
      mode: input.mode,
      sourceType: "rss",
      kind: input.mode === "update" ? input.kind : slugifySourceKind(metadata.title),
      name: metadata.title,
      siteUrl: metadata.siteUrl,
      rssUrl
    };
  }

  const wechatName = normalizeDisplayName(input.wechatName);
  const registration = await registerWechatBridgeSource(
    input.articleUrl?.trim()
      ? {
          bridgeKind: "wechat2rss",
          inputMode: "article_url",
          articleUrl: input.articleUrl
        }
      : {
          bridgeKind: "wechat2rss",
          inputMode: "name_lookup",
          wechatName
        },
    deps
  );

  return {
    mode: input.mode,
    sourceType: "wechat_bridge",
    kind: input.mode === "update" ? input.kind : slugifyWechatKind(wechatName),
    name: wechatName,
    siteUrl: "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/",
    bridgeKind: "wechat2rss",
    inputMode: "feed_url",
    feedUrl: registration.rssUrl
  };
}
```

```ts
// src/core/wechat/wechatBridgeProviders.ts
export async function registerWechat2rssByName(
  wechatName: string,
  runtime: WechatBridgeRuntimeConfig,
  fetchFn: typeof fetch = fetch
): Promise<string> {
  const response = await fetchFn(
    `${runtime.baseUrl}/search?name=${encodeURIComponent(wechatName)}&k=${encodeURIComponent(runtime.token)}`
  );

  if (!response.ok) {
    throw new Error("Wechat bridge search failed");
  }

  const result = (await response.json()) as { err?: string; data?: string };

  if (result.err || !result.data) {
    throw new Error("Wechat bridge search returned no feed");
  }

  return normalizeBridgeFeedUrl(result.data);
}
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Replace advanced route parsing with resolver-backed user payload parsing**

```ts
// src/server/createServer.ts
type SaveSourceUserPayload =
  | { sourceType: "rss"; rssUrl: string }
  | { sourceType: "wechat_bridge"; wechatName: string; articleUrl?: string };

function parseSourceCreatePayload(body: unknown): SaveSourceUserPayload | null {
  if (!body || typeof body !== "object") {
    return null;
  }

  const payload = body as Record<string, unknown>;
  const sourceType = typeof payload.sourceType === "string" ? payload.sourceType.trim() : "";

  if (sourceType === "rss") {
    const rssUrl = typeof payload.rssUrl === "string" ? payload.rssUrl.trim() : "";
    return rssUrl ? { sourceType: "rss", rssUrl } : null;
  }

  if (sourceType === "wechat_bridge") {
    const wechatName = typeof payload.wechatName === "string" ? payload.wechatName.trim() : "";
    const articleUrl = typeof payload.articleUrl === "string" ? payload.articleUrl.trim() : "";
    return wechatName ? { sourceType: "wechat_bridge", wechatName, articleUrl: articleUrl || undefined } : null;
  }

  return null;
}
```

```ts
// src/main.ts
createSource: async (input) => {
  const normalized = await resolveSourceUserInput({ mode: "create", ...input }, {
    fetch,
    wechatBridge: config.wechatBridge ?? null
  });

  return await persistSource(db, normalized, {
    wechatBridge: config.wechatBridge ?? null
  });
},
updateSource: async (kind, input) => {
  const normalized = await resolveSourceUserInput({ mode: "update", kind, ...input }, {
    fetch,
    wechatBridge: config.wechatBridge ?? null
  });

  return await persistSource(db, normalized, {
    wechatBridge: config.wechatBridge ?? null
  });
}
```

```ts
// src/core/source/sourceMutationRepository.ts
// Keep only normalized persistence logic here.
// The repository should no longer infer name/siteUrl/kind from user-facing payloads.
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Replace the advanced client payloads and modal fields**

```ts
// src/client/services/settingsApi.ts
export type SaveSourcePayload =
  | {
      sourceType: "rss";
      rssUrl: string;
    }
  | {
      sourceType: "wechat_bridge";
      wechatName: string;
      articleUrl?: string;
    };
```

```ts
// src/client/pages/settings/SourcesPage.vue
type SourceFormState = {
  sourceType: "rss" | "wechat_bridge";
  rssUrl: string;
  wechatName: string;
  articleUrl: string;
};

function buildSourceSavePayload(): { ok: true; payload: SaveSourcePayload } | { ok: false; message: string } {
  if (sourceForm.sourceType === "rss") {
    return sourceForm.rssUrl.trim()
      ? { ok: true, payload: { sourceType: "rss", rssUrl: sourceForm.rssUrl.trim() } }
      : { ok: false, message: "请填写 RSS URL。" };
  }

  return sourceForm.wechatName.trim()
    ? {
        ok: true,
        payload: {
          sourceType: "wechat_bridge",
          wechatName: sourceForm.wechatName.trim(),
          articleUrl: sourceForm.articleUrl.trim() || undefined
        }
      }
    : { ok: false, message: "请填写公众号名称。" };
}
```

```vue
<!-- src/client/pages/settings/SourcesPage.vue -->
<label v-if="sourceForm.sourceType === 'rss'">
  <span>RSS URL</span>
  <input v-model="sourceForm.rssUrl" data-source-form="rss-url" />
</label>

<template v-else>
  <label>
    <span>公众号名称</span>
    <input v-model="sourceForm.wechatName" data-source-form="wechat-name" />
  </label>
  <label>
    <span>公众号文章链接（可选）</span>
    <input v-model="sourceForm.articleUrl" data-source-form="article-url" />
  </label>
</template>
```

```ts
// but stop returning user-facing bridge input summaries if the UI no longer renders them.

  kind: row.kind,
  name: row.name,
  siteUrl: row.site_url,
  rssUrl: row.rss_url,
  isEnabled: row.is_enabled === 1,
  isBuiltIn: row.is_builtin === 1,
  showAllWhenSelected: row.show_all_when_selected === 1,
  sourceType: row.source_type,
  bridgeKind: row.bridge_kind,
  bridgeConfigSummary: null,
  bridgeInputMode: null,
  bridgeInputValue: null
};
```

## Self-Review

- Spec coverage:
  - 极简 RSS 输入 -> Task 1 + Task 3
  - 极简公众号输入 -> Task 1 + Task 3
  - 自动生成 `kind/name/siteUrl/rssUrl` -> Task 1 + Task 2
  - 保持 bridge 保存时解析和 RSS-first 主链路 -> Task 1 + Task 2
  - 不暴露内部字段 -> Task 3 + Task 4
- Placeholder scan:
  - No `TODO / TBD / later` placeholders remain.
- Type consistency:
  - Plan consistently uses `SaveSourceUserInput`, `resolveSourceUserInput(...)`, and normalized `SaveSourceInput`.
